meta.title: Canopi — Agroecological Design Tool
meta.description: Download Canopi 0.8.1 to plan food forests, gardens, and agroecological systems with reusable Saved Object Stamps, richer plant symbols, direct zone editing, and corrected app-version reporting. Free and open source for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
hero.screenshotCaption: Fig. 1 — Design canvas with zone tools and species database.
hero.subtext: Canopi is a free desktop tool to plan food forests, gardens, and agroecological systems that work with your local soil and climate. Version 0.8.1 keeps the Saved Object Stamps release current, fixes About Canopi so it reports 0.8.1 from the Tauri config, and tightens release checks so packaged artifacts stay version-aligned.
features.label: What you get
features.title: Canopi 0.8.1 keeps the v0.8 release aligned
features.desc: This patch release preserves Saved Object Stamps, clearer plant symbols, and direct zone refinement while correcting version reporting and strengthening release-candidate checks.
features.plants.title: 175,000+ plant species
features.plants.desc: Look up plants by climate zone, soil type, sun needs, edibility, nitrogen fixation, and more, then place them with expanded groundcover, wave, shrub, and symbol controls.
features.zones.title: Direct zone refinement
features.zones.desc: Edit zone control points directly on the canvas, with steadier ellipse hit testing and more predictable handle behavior.
features.stamp.title: Saved Object Stamps
features.stamp.desc: Save the current canvas selection as a reusable arrangement, drag it back into a design, import or export stamps, rename them inline, and reorder them manually.
features.spacing.title: Accurate app version
features.spacing.desc: About Canopi now reads the app release version from desktop/tauri.conf.json, so this build reports 0.8.1 instead of stale metadata.
features.reports.title: Synchronized release checks
features.reports.desc: Release-candidate preflight now verifies Rust workspace, Tauri, npm package, and npm lockfile versions before packaged artifacts are built.
features.workspace.title: Documented release notes
features.workspace.desc: GitHub Releases now use prepared docs/release-notes/v<version>.md files as the base release body, keeping promotion notes consistent with shipped artifacts.
download.label: Get started
download.title: Download Canopi
download.desc: Canopi 0.8.1 is free and open source under the AGPL v3 license. Currently in beta — things are still being polished.
download.releaseNotes: Canopi v0.8.1 release notes on GitHub
timeline.label: Global food security timeline
timeline.hint: Click an event to learn more
timeline.oil1973.title: Oil Embargo & Food Price Spiral
timeline.oil1973.stat: OPEC embargo quadruples oil prices — $3 to $12/barrel in under 3 months. Wheat prices triple by early 1974.
timeline.ethiopia1984.title: Ethiopian Famine
timeline.ethiopia1984.stat: Drought and civil war affect 7.75 million people. An estimated 1 million deaths.
timeline.foodcrisis2008.title: Global Food Price Crisis
timeline.foodcrisis2008.stat: Rice prices rise 217%, wheat 136%, corn 125%. Food riots erupt across 37 countries.
timeline.russia2010.title: Russian Wheat Export Ban
timeline.russia2010.stat: Record heatwave destroys one-third of Russia's wheat harvest. Wheat prices surge 42% in a single month.
timeline.arabspring2011.title: Arab Spring
timeline.arabspring2011.stat: Surging food prices help ignite uprisings across the Middle East and North Africa. FAO Food Price Index hits record high.
timeline.eastafrica2011.title: East Africa Famine
timeline.eastafrica2011.stat: Worst drought in 60 years across the Horn of Africa. 260,000 dead in Somalia — more than half children under five.
timeline.locusts2020.title: East Africa Locust Swarms
timeline.locusts2020.stat: Worst desert locust outbreak in decades ravages cropland. Over 25 million people face severe food insecurity.
timeline.covid2020.title: COVID-19 Pandemic
timeline.covid2020.stat: Lockdowns and economic collapse disrupt global food supply chains. People facing acute hunger nearly doubles: 135 to 265 million.
timeline.ukraine2022.title: Russia-Ukraine War
timeline.ukraine2022.stat: Russia and Ukraine supply 28% of global wheat and 75% of sunflower oil. Ukrainian grain exports fall over 90%.
timeline.indiarice2023.title: India Rice Export Ban
timeline.indiarice2023.stat: World's largest rice exporter — 40% of global trade — bans non-basmati white rice exports. Rice prices hit highest in a decade.
timeline.redsea2024.title: Red Sea Shipping Crisis
timeline.redsea2024.stat: Houthi attacks force rerouting of global shipping. Suez Canal trade volume drops 42%. Container traffic falls up to 90%.
timeline.hormuz2026.title: Strait of Hormuz Crisis
timeline.hormuz2026.stat: Military conflict closes the world's most critical energy chokepoint. 20% of global oil, 20% of LNG, and 30% of fertilizer trade transits the strait.
